revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月廿四]][[zh:十二月廿四]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 24|qq=December 24}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 24''' is the 24th day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}. == Events == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1601|en|1601|qid=Q6725|lt=1601|1=1601}} {{ill|January 28|en|January 28|qid=Q2285|lt=January 28|1=January 28}}) – At the command of {{ill|Date Masamune|en|Date Masamune|qid=Q311183|lt=Date Masamune|1=Date Masamune}}, construction of {{ill|Aoba Castle|en|Aoba Castle|qid=Q598621|lt=Sendai Castle|1=Aoba Castle}} and its {{ill|Jōkamachi|en|Jōkamachi|qid=Q909458|lt=Castle Town|1=Jōkamachi}} began. * {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|qid=Q1192766|lt=Meireki|1=Meireki}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1657|en|1657|qid=Q6987|lt=1657|1=1657}} {{ill|February 7|en|February 7|qid=Q2322|lt=February 7|1=February 7}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} ordered the relocation of the pleasure quarters of the 【{{ill|日本橋|en|日本橋|qid=Q1305451|lt=Nihonbashi|1=日本橋}}】 area (葭町の葭原, later known as {{ill|Yoshiwara|ja|吉原|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiwara|1=Yoshihara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4053786}}) to Asakusa Sen-tasuku. == Births == * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|January 18|en|January 18|qid=Q2265|lt=January 18|1=January 18}}) – {{ill|Kantarō Suzuki|en|Kantarō Suzuki|qid=Q335198|lt=Suzuki Kantarō|1=Kantarō Suzuki}}, the 42nd {{ill|Prime Minister of Japan|en|Prime Minister of Japan|qid=Q274948|lt=Prime Minister of Japan|1=Prime Minister of Japan}} and an admiral (died {{ill|1948|en|1948|qid=Q5165|lt=1948|1=1948}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1561|en|1561|qid=Q6618|lt=1561|1=1561}} {{ill|January 9|en|January 9|qid=Q2238|lt=January 9|1=January 9}}) – {{ill|Amago Haruhisa|en|Amago Haruhisa|qid=Q3273106|lt=Amago Haruhisa|1=Amago Haruhisa}}, a {{ill|Sengoku warrior|ja|戦国武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku warrior|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 武将|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 武将|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (born {{ill|1514|en|1514|qid=Q6204|lt=1514|1=1514}}). == Commemorations == * 納めの地蔵 : The annual last {{ill|Kṣitigarbha|en|Kṣitigarbha|qid=Q604687|lt=Jizō Bodhisattva|1=Kṣitigarbha}} festival. * 終い愛宕 : The annual last {{ill|Atago Gongen|en|Atago Gongen|qid=Q1101132|lt=Atago Gongen|1=Atago Gongen}} festival.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|23|12|25|11|24|1|12|1224|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|12月24日 (旧暦)|version=98702666|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:12 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:December 24 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 12월 24일]] [[ja:12月24日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十二月廿四]]
[[ar:December 24 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十二月廿四]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十二月廿四]] {{wikidata link|Q840461}} [[Category:Days 24 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar December]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
